product.description: Put the hurt on dirt. Grease + grime don't stand a chance. not with the cutting-edge green chemistry of PowerGreen Technology in your grasp. each squirt, in all its lovely non-toxic glory, delivers a mighty cleaning punch with naturally derived, biodegradable ingredients. Its cleaners, derived from corn + coconut, break down dirt naturally, so every spray leaves nothing behind but a fresh scent + gleaming clean. knock out dirt with the power of plants.

metaData.Key Information:
• Naturally derived, biodegradable ingredients
• Cuts Grease + Grime
• If there's a chance an ingredient isn't safe, we don't use it. Period
• We don't do dirty. Here's a list of ingredients we don't ever use: Chlorine Bleach, Triclosan, EDTA, Phosphates, 2-Butoxyethanol. Phthalates, Paraben, Ammonia, MEA (Ethanolamine)
• Made in USA
